title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Aramex India

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at Aramex India
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Aramex India. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Amritsar-based team.

About Aramex India:
Aramex India is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure proper handling, packaging, and labeling of goods
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Coordinate with warehousing teams for inbound and outbound operations
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization
• Handle customs clearance for import and export shipments
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Cold Chain Logistics
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Last Mile Delivery
• Proficiency in ERP Systems
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Aramex India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
